race.description: Thank You, Tony Scott! Mdn Plate (C1)
race.comment: DON TURBOAS (2) is an honest three-year-old who broke through for a determined win last time and suspect it might turn a good form race. Looks suited out to the mile now and expected to measure up again. THE LITTLE BAY (6) was just beaten in open three-year-old class two back then fourth here last time. Has the figures to go close and worth another chance. MERLIN BEACH (3) has put together a string of placings since a maiden win. Placed 2/3 this course and distance and should be in the finish again. THEM'S THE BREAKS (10) resumed as favourite over 2100m and kept coming for a close-up fourth. Coming back in trip but will be toughest to the line and can sneak into the finish. LAST TREMBLE (8) was runner-up in the same race and is also among the chances.
